name: 70"x70" Tablecloth Blue Floral - Threshold™
description:
Add delightful charm to your table setting with this Blue Floral Tablecloth from Threshold™. Made from 100% cotton, this round tablecloth offers protection against spills, stains and scratches. Adorned with allover floral print on a blue background, this decorative tablecloth elevates your tablescape, and the machine-washable design makes cleaning a breeze.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
